story.text:
# ✨ Share a Frame
**📐 → ⊥(perpendicular) → 🌐(shared frame)**
*luca · substrate · V0 (cross-anchored at V31 holon and V19 forge)*

Share a coordinate frame across two Mages' work so the same point in their respective registers names the same position. The cross-frame substrate is mutually intelligible because both Mages name the same ground.

> Two Mages who share a frame share a substrate. Two registers that resolve to the same coordinates name the same point.

*Keywords:* share · frame · cross-frame · v0 · v31 · v19 · substrate
